prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-MGATSK-3E-GRN Product Type: SEWING_TOOL_SET Brand (from catalog): McNett Existing Title: Gear Aid Tactical Sewing Kit Description: Uniform repairs are inevitable for any professional. That's why you need to keep a compact sewing kit on hand, like the Sewing Kit by Tactical.

Featuring high-quality thread, military buttons, sewing needles, straight pins, safety pins, a seam ripper and thimble, this lightweight sewing kit repairs ripped clothing, broken equipment or anything else that needs mending. The included repair manual ensures even the most novice needle worker can make needed repairs to tactical gear.

When you need to sew clothing, repair uniforms or replace Velcro, grab a Sewing Kit by Tactical. Search Terms: basic sewing kit military field repair beginner's sew emergency Features: - Sewing Kit Contains High-Quality Threads and Needles - Military Buttons and Threads (Foliage Green) - Compact and Lightweight Travel Kit - Sew Clothing and Repair Rips and Tears - Includes Instructions and Repair Manual === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: McNett Gear Aid Tactical Sewing Kit Foliage Green

openai.item_name: McNett Foliage Green Tactical Sewing Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: Military Buttons And Thread, High-Quality Needles, Compact Travel Kit, Repair Manual Included, Emergency Field Repairs

openai.title_differentiation: High-Quality Threads And Needles, Military Buttons And Threads, Compact Lightweight Travel Kit, Repair Manual
